title: Add byox_ladder difficulty-ladder generator
objective: Add a self-contained tool that ranks the codecrafters build-your-own-x projects by difficulty and emits two offline HTML pages: a per-guide ladder (~360 tutorials) and a per-category ladder (30 categories), grouped into Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert tiers plus an Unsorted bucket.
acceptance_criteria: python_pkg/byox_ladder parses the upstream README into guides.json via parse_guides.py
build_pages.py emits standalone guide-ladder.html and category-ladder.html that open via file:// with no network
make build regenerates the whole pipeline (fetch -> parse -> build)
Tests reach 100% branch coverage on parse_guides.py and build_pages.py
All pre-commit hooks pass (ruff ALL, mypy, pylint, bandit, codespell, check-python-location)
out_of_scope: Vendoring the upstream README (fetched at build time, gitignored)
Any change to existing python_pkg packages or repo tooling
A per-guide exact 1..N ranking (difficulty is tier-based by design)
verifier: pre-commit run --all-files (pre-push stage) and python3 -m pytest python_pkg/byox_ladder/tests
